query: classic tomato soup with roasted tomatoes, basil, and cream option

draft.title: Tomato Soup
draft.description: Classic tomato soup with roasted tomatoes, fresh basil, and an optional touch of cream for richness.

steps.text: Preheat the oven to 200°C. Place halved tomatoes on a baking tray, drizzle with 1 tbsp olive oil, and roast for 25 minutes until soft and slightly caramelized.
Heat remaining olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the roasted tomatoes (including juices), vegetable stock, and fresh basil leaves to the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
Remove from heat and blend the soup using an immersion blender until smooth. If too thick, add a little water or stock to reach desired consistency.
Return soup to low heat, season with salt, pepper, and sugar if needed. Heat through gently.
Serve hot, garnished with extra basil leaves and a swirl of heavy cream if desired.
